channel.title: Find Best AI — Blog
channel.description: AI tools reviews, comparisons, and guides — updated weekly.

item.title: Best AI Video Generator Tools in 2026 — Free & Paid Compared
item.description: We tested Sora, RunwayML, Kling AI, Pika Labs, Synthesia, InVideo AI and Luma. Here are the honest results.

item.title: Midjourney vs DALL-E 3 vs Adobe Firefly: 2025 Image AI Showdown
item.description: We tested all three on 50 identical prompts. The results will surprise you — especially on pricing.

item.title: 10 Free AI Tools That Replace Expensive Software
item.description: Free alternatives to Photoshop, Premiere Pro, and more — all powered by AI and available right now.

item.title: Cursor AI Deep Dive Review — 30 Days as Our Primary IDE
item.description: We used Cursor as our main IDE for a full month. Honest review — what's great, what's broken, and who it's really for.

item.title: AI Prompt Engineering 101 — Get Dramatically Better Results
item.description: The exact techniques that separate mediocre AI output from professional-quality results. With real before/after examples.
